title: Add descriptions to dashboard service table

log.context: Add descriptions to dashboard service table

Done. Two targeted changes made to `/mnt/data/hello-world/index.html`:

1. **Header row** (`thead.innerHTML`): added `<th>description</th>` between `service` and `status`.
2. **Row builder** (`renderServices`): inserted a new `tdDesc` cell after `tdName` that reads `svc.description`, truncates at 35 chars with ellipsis, and applies `opacity: 0.6` for the muted look. The cell also has `max-width: 220px` with overflow ellipsis as a CSS safety net.

No service restart needed — static HTML is served...(truncated)
